notes: Adopted the clean preserved MI325X worktree without resetting or mixing MI300X edits.

Throughput uses total token throughput per GPU and is maximized. p90 E2E is per-request request_latency p90 in seconds and is minimized. p90 interactivity is p90 of per-request reciprocal ITL in tok/s/user and is maximized.
Focused 900-second no-eval baseline: TP8 concurrency 1,4,8,16,24 for low-latency coverage and DEP8 concurrency 16,32,48,64 for throughput coverage.
